svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Codex"> <diagram id="agent-task-loop-architecture" name="Agent Task Loop 系统架构总图"> <mxGraphModel dx="-739" dy="-210" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=28;fontStyle=1;" value="Agent Task Loop V0.1 系统架构" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="800" x="400" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef4ff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=18;" value="任务输入层
捕获但不自动执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="300" x="40" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff7db;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=18;" value="任务管理层
形成唯一任务事实" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="300" x="390" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#eef4ff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=18;" value="Agent 执行层
受限领取与只读调研" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="300" x="740" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lane-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dff4e6;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;verticalAlign=top;spacingTop=18;" value="验收回流层
用户保留最终决策权" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="520" width="300" x="1090" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="每日复盘
明确待办 / 推断候选" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="72" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="主动快速录入
工作中随手捕获" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="72" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="未来渠道
通过收集接口扩展" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="72" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="Inbox 与来源去重
候选任务不可执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="422" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="人工严格准入
目标 / 项目 / 验收 / 权限" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="422" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="项目看板与 Task Store
状态和上下文唯一事实" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="422" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-7" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="执行入口
队列 / 时段 / 额度校验" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="772" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-8" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="Agent 领取
仅一个 Ready 调研任务" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="772" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-9" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#5b8def;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="只读调研与 Artifact
证据 / 结论 / 不确定项" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="772" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="待验收入口
结果与标准逐项对照" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="1122" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="人工通过或退回
反馈驱动下一次执行" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="1122" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="card-12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="Done / Blocked / Cancelled
结果和历史持续可追溯" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="86" width="236" x="1122" y="410" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="support" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff1b8;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;fontStyle=1;" value="共享治理支撑：权限边界 / 审计记录 / 幂等去重 / 失败恢复 / 运行时段 / 并发与每日额度" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="650" x="390" y="640" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-4"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-5"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#d8a437;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-6"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-7"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-7" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-8"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e8" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-8" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#4e7fd1;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-9"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-9" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-10"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-11"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#2e9c61;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;" target="card-12"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="card-11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;strokeColor=#c65d4d;strokeWidth=2.5;endArrow=block;fontSize=15;exitX=0;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;" target="card-6" value="退回并附反馈"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1060" y="333" /> <mxPoint x="1060" y="550" /> <mxPoint x="540" y="550" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
